title: Just Enough Mekanism Multiblocks
description: Add JEI page for calculate mekanism multiblock cost
body:
# Summary
Add JEI page about Mekanism mod's multiblocks.
Can calculate construction cost and multiblock's ability.

# Features
1. Support JEI + button.
2. Calculate fluid/gas tank capacity.
3. Calculate 'Fission Reactor' temp and heating rate.
4. Calculate 'Thermoelectric Boiler' sodium cooling rate.
5. Calculate 'Industrial Turbine' efficiency.

# Supported Multiblocks

## Mekanism
1. Dynamic Tank
2. Thermal Evaporation Plant
3. SPS
4. Thermoelectric Boiler
5. Induction Matrix

## Mekanism Generator
1. Industrial Turbine
2. Fission Reactor
3. Fusion Reactor
